summary: Iteration 34: Tested upselling on WebsitePage and Gestione Sito save functionality. All features working correctly. /prenota redirects to /sito, upselling suggestions appear after booking with 15% discount, add-service API works, and Gestione Sito save works for all tabs (General, Upselling, Layout, Aspetto, Orari & Contatti).

1. /prenota returns 200 (React handles redirect) - PASS
2. /sito returns 200 - PASS
3. GET /api/public/upselling returns suggestions for trigger service - PASS
4. Upselling discount is 15% - PASS
5. POST /api/public/appointments/{id}/add-service success - PASS
6. Add service with wrong phone returns 403 - PASS
7. GET /api/website/config returns config with upselling fields - PASS
8. Save General tab config persists - PASS
9. Save Upselling tab config persists - PASS
10. Save Layout tab (section_order) persists - PASS
11. Save Aspetto tab (colors/fonts) persists - PASS
12. Save Orari & Contatti tab persists - PASS

14. Public services available - PASS

16. Public website data endpoint works - PASS
17. Booking creates appointment with appointment_id - PASS
FRONTEND UI TESTS:
1. /prenota redirects to /sito - PASS (URL changes to /sito)
2. Website landing page loads with BRUNO MELITO HAIR - PASS
3. Booking flow step 1 (service selection) - PASS
4. Booking flow step 2 (date/time selection) - PASS
5. Booking flow step 3 (client details) - PASS

7. Upselling suggestions visible after booking - PASS (2 items: Maschera curativa €2.55, Ki Power BI/fasico €17)
8. Add upsell service button works - PASS (toast: 'Maschera curativa aggiunto con 15% di sconto!')
9. '1 servizio aggiunto al tuo appuntamento!' confirmation - PASS
10. Gestione Sito page loads - PASS
11. General tab save works - PASS
12. Upselling tab visible with discount input (15%) - PASS
13. Layout tab visible with section order list - PASS
14. Aspetto tab visible with theme presets - PASS
15. Orari & Contatti tab visible - PASS
16. Save button works and shows 'Configurazione salvata!' toast - PASS
17. Page reloads successfully after save - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: WebsitePage.jsx: Upselling implementation is correct - Lines 459-465 define upselling states, Lines 608-645 handle booking with upselling fetch, Lines 629-645 implement addUpsellService function, Lines 668-730 render success page with upselling UI
App.js: Line 220 correctly redirects /prenota to /sito using <Navigate to='/sito' replace />
WebsiteAdminPage.jsx: saveConfig function (Lines 68-76) correctly calls PUT /api/website/config and updates state
public.py: Lines 329-360 implement GET /api/public/upselling with correct discount calculation, Lines 363-409 implement POST /api/public/appointments/{id}/add-service with phone verification
seed_data_creation: Created test appointments with TEST_ prefix for upselling tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 verified: 1) /prenota redirects to /sito (BookingPage.jsx deleted, Navigate redirect in App.js). 2) Upselling works end-to-end: booking with Taglio Donna triggers suggestions for Maschera curativa and Ki Power BI/fasico with 15% discount. 3) Add-service API works with phone verification. 4) Gestione Sito save works for all tabs (General, Upselling, Layout, Aspetto, Orari & Contatti). Upselling rule exists: trigger='01 Taglio Donna' (id: 7188fb89-2029-449a-8c09-a322104355bc), suggests='10 Laminazione - Ki Power' and '08 Maschera curativa'.

prenota_redirect.details: /prenota redirects to /sito via <Navigate to='/sito' replace /> in App.js line 220

upselling_on_success_page.details: After booking with Taglio Donna, upselling suggestions appear with 15% discount. UI shows 'Completa il tuo look!' section with Aggiungi buttons.

upselling_add_service.details: Clicking Aggiungi calls POST /api/public/appointments/{id}/add-service, shows success toast, and updates appointment

upselling_api.details: GET /api/public/upselling?service_ids={ids} returns suggestions with discounted_price and discount_percent (15%)

gestione_sito_save.details: All tabs save correctly via PUT /api/website/config. Toast shows 'Configurazione salvata!'
